Hero.title: Expert Installation &
Hero.description: Specialized in Müller Martini, Kolbus, and Hörauf printing machines. We provide comprehensive installation, repair, and maintenance services across Europe with over 15 years of experience.
Hero.ctaPrimaryAria: Get started — go to the contact section

Services.title: Comprehensive
Services.subtitle: From installation to maintenance, we provide complete support for your industrial machinery needs.

repair.title: Machine Service & Repair
repair.description: Expert maintenance and repair of Müller Martini, Kolbus, and Hörauf printing machines. Fast response time and professional diagnostics.

installation.title: Installation & Dismantling
installation.description: Professional installation and relocation services for industrial machinery. Complete project management from start to finish.

parts.title: Replacement Parts
parts.description: High-quality replacement parts for all major printing machine brands. Fast delivery and expert consultation.

emergency.title: Emergency Support
emergency.description: 24/7 emergency support for critical machine failures. Minimize downtime with our rapid response team.

preventive.title: Preventive Maintenance
preventive.description: Regular maintenance programs to prevent breakdowns and extend machine lifespan. Customized service plans.

modernization.title: Modernization & Upgrades
modernization.description: Upgrade older machines with modern technology. Improve efficiency and extend equipment life.

expertise.title: Printing Machine Maintenance Müller Martini
expertise.subtitle: We service all generations and models with expert precision

Services.ctaAria: Request service quote — go to contact section

About.title: Leading Provider of
About.description: MD Mechatronica, founded by Michał Dudek, is a trusted partner for companies across Europe requiring professional maintenance, installation, and repair services for complex industrial machinery.
About.additionalService1: We are able to repair also other machines
About.feature2: Specialized in Müller Martini, Kolbus & Hörauf

Values.title: What Drives Us
Values.subtitle: At MD Mechatronica, we rely on honesty, discipline and hard work. Our success is attributed to upholding a simple set of core values.

honesty.title: Honesty
honesty.description: Be humble in all dealings with our partners, clients and team members. True wisdom and understanding belong to the humble.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: Success is when we can achieve results in the things we are passionate about and feel as though we are making a difference.

quality.title: Quality Work
quality.description: We ensure that all projects are done with utmost professionalism using quality materials while offering clients the support and accessibility.

dedication.title: Dedication
dedication.description: Our dedicated team works tirelessly to ensure every project meets the highest standards of excellence and customer satisfaction.

Projects.title: Our latest
Projects.paragraph1: At MD Mechatronica, we rely on honesty, discipline and hard work. We believe our success can be attributed to upholding a simple set of core values that date back to the beginning of the company.
Projects.paragraph2: MD Mechatronica is an integrated service firm offering installation, maintenance, and repair services to customers throughout Europe. Unique to MD Mechatronica is the fact that we conduct all services in-house with highly skilled technicians.
Projects.modalDetailsBody: This project showcases our expertise in handling complex industrial machinery installations and maintenance. Our team of certified technicians worked closely with the client to ensure minimal downtime and maximum efficiency.

diamant.title: Müller Martini Diamant Installation
diamant.description: Complete installation and calibration of Diamant hardcover system for major printing facility in Germany.

kolbus.title: Kolbus RF Complete Overhaul
kolbus.description: Full mechanical and electrical overhaul of Kolbus RF binding line with modernization and automation upgrades.

trimmer.title: Three-Knife Trimmer Upgrade
trimmer.description: Technology upgrade for Esprit trimmer including automation systems and safety improvements.

emergency.title: Emergency Production Line Repair
emergency.description: 24-hour emergency response for critical production line failure, restoring operations within deadline.

Contact.title: Ready to Start Your
Contact.subtitle: Contact us today and let's discuss how we can help with your machinery needs.
Contact.qrScanDescription: Point your camera at the QR code to instantly call us
Contact.bottomCta: Need immediate assistance? Scan the QR code above to call us directly.
Contact.formSuccessMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

Contact.formPrivacy: We respect your privacy. Your information will never be shared.
